newsShow334_body:
Welcome the 20th CPC Congress and Promote High-Quality Development

On the morning of October 16, the KIWL Group Party Branch organized Party members and cadres to watch the opening ceremony of the 20th National Congress of the Communist Party of China. Party members and cadres were greatly inspired by General Secretary Xi Jinping's report, especially the great transformations of the new era over the past decade.

Quality is the cornerstone of core product competitiveness. For many years, KIWL Group has upheld the corporate values of "Innovation, Craftsmanship, Dedication, and Harmony," driven by technological innovation. On the journey into the new era, the company is building a new development pattern for the fluid-power industry and promoting high-quality development. In September, KIWL welcomed second-party audits from two major OEM customers, XCMG Construction Machinery and Weichai Lovol. Expert teams conducted a comprehensive and systematic review of KIWL's quality management system.

Seizing this opportunity, KIWL Group held a management improvement meeting themed "Welcome the 20th CPC Congress, Forge Ahead on a New Journey, and Promote KIWL High-Quality Development." The company committed to deepening management comprehensively, pursuing a "zero-defect" goal, staying firmly on the path of high-quality development, and continuously improving innovation in key core components to contribute KIWL's "China Core" to China's high-end equipment manufacturing industry.

Riding the momentum of the 20th CPC Congress, KIWL Group will continue its innovation-driven development strategy and remain dedicated to building a China Core for national heavy equipment with KIWL wisdom, solutions, and strength.
newsShow333_body:
Stay Firm in Direction and Forge Ahead on the New Era Journey

On November 30, the KIWL Group Party Branch held a special study session on "Studying and Implementing the Spirit of the Sixth Plenary Session of the 19th CPC Central Committee." Joint Party Branch Secretary and Chairman Jiang Wei led the study. All Party members, cadres, probationary members, and activists attended. Branch venues in Shanghai and Xuzhou joined synchronously.

The meeting pointed out

The Sixth Plenary Session of the 19th CPC Central Committee was convened at a major historical moment as the Party marked its centenary, achieved the first centenary goal of building a moderately prosperous society, and embarked on the second centenary goal of building a modern socialist country.

The meeting emphasized

Studying, publicizing, and implementing the spirit of the Sixth Plenary Session is a major political task for the Group at present and for the foreseeable future. All Party members and cadres must study the spirit thoroughly, grasp its essence, unify thought and action with the Session's requirements, and translate new ideas and measures into practical plans to promote high-quality development and forge ahead on the new era journey.

The meeting stressed

First, raise political awareness. All Party members should treat studying and implementing the Session's spirit as a top priority, study diligently, and ensure accurate understanding. Leading cadres should set an example and drive company-wide enthusiasm for implementation.

Second, plan carefully. All departments should work together under the Party Branch leadership. Department heads and assigned Party members are primarily responsible for ensuring full coverage of study and publicity.

Third, strengthen supervision. The Party Branch will include implementation of the Session's spirit in its oversight scope, track progress across units, and address new issues promptly.
newsShow301_body:
KIWL Group Party Branch

Special Study Session on the Sixth Plenary Session of the 19th CPC Central Committee

On November 30, the KIWL Group Party Branch held a special study session on the spirit of the Sixth Plenary Session of the 19th CPC Central Committee. Joint Party Branch Secretary and Chairman Jiang Wei led the study. All Party members, cadres, probationary members, and activists participated, with branch venues in Shanghai and Xuzhou joining online.

The meeting pointed out

The Sixth Plenary Session was held at a major historical juncture as the Party celebrated its centenary and advanced toward the second centenary goal of building a modern socialist country.

The meeting emphasized

Studying and implementing the Session's spirit is a major political task. All cadres must study deeply, grasp the core meaning, unify thought and action, and translate new concepts into concrete measures for high-quality development.

The meeting stressed

First, raise political awareness. Party members should prioritize studying the Session's spirit. Leading cadres should set an example.

Second, plan carefully. Departments should coordinate under the Party Branch and ensure full learning coverage.

Third, strengthen supervision. The Party Branch will track implementation across all units and resolve issues promptly.
newsShow300_body:
Tsingshan Group and KIWL Group Party Organizations

Hold Party Building Exchange Activity

Stay True to Our Founding Mission   Keep Our Mission Firmly in Mind

On June 29, ahead of the Party's centenary, Tsingshan Group and KIWL Group held a joint Party Day activity to celebrate the 100th anniversary of the founding of the CPC and exchange experiences in Party building among private enterprises in the new era.

Led by KIWL Party Branch Secretary and Chairman Jiang Wei and Tsingshan Party Branch Secretary Sun Yuanlin, all Party members reviewed the oath of joining the Party and reaffirmed their original aspirations.

Party members visited KIWL's Party History School, Technology Experience Hall, robotic automatic lines, FMS flexible manufacturing line, intelligent control platform, and Class 100,000 clean assembly workshop to experience the driving force of innovation under Xi Jinping Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era. At the employee cultural center, they exchanged views on building a harmonious home and employee wellbeing.

At the symposium, Secretary Sun Yuanlin said the exchange strengthened cultural identity and Party building innovation between the two sides, and expressed hope for deeper cooperation. Chairman Jiang Wei noted that Tsingshan Group is a global leader in stainless steel and new energy, and an benchmark KIWL has long admired. Under the guidance of Party history spirit, both sides will continue to strengthen exchanges and explore distinctive models of Party building in private enterprises.
newsShow299_body:
Warmly Celebrating

the 100th Anniversary of the Founding of the Communist Party of China

1921--2021

As the CPC approaches its centenary, KIWL Group Limited held a series of July 1 themed activities to celebrate the Party's hundred-year journey and amplify the voice of the private economy in the new era.

Honor Our Commitment, Keep Our Oath

"Let us review the oath of joining the Party together. Please raise your right hand and face the Party flag." On the morning of June 26, resounding oaths echoed in KIWL's Party History School. Led by Party Branch Secretary and Chairman Jiang Wei, Party members reviewed their solemn pledges.

At the meeting, Secretary Jiang Wei presented Party badges and copies of the Party Constitution to three new members in 2021. All members also watched the People's Daily micro-video "I Swear" to revisit the original aspirations of revolutionary predecessors.

Study Party History, Apply Ideas, Deliver Results, Break New Ground

Since the start of 2021, through study of books such as "On the History of the Communist Party of China" and Party lectures by branch secretaries, KIWL's Party organization has used its Party History School to deliver profound education on Party history and ideals. In the first half of the year, production continued to grow, with May output up 38.5% year-on-year and exceeding 70,000 units for the first time. Party members played a vanguard role in driving performance.

Party Building Guides Strategic Development — Building the KIWL Dream and China Core

KIWL continuously improves Party building to guide high-quality development, focusing on intelligent manufacturing innovation, breakthroughs in key core technologies, and building a China Core for national heavy equipment.

The company adheres to the principle of the Party nurturing talent, developing activists and members among technical staff, managers, and skilled workers, and building talent teams such as IE engineers and KIWL master craftsmen through its "Family Culture," "Craftsmanship Spirit," and "Lu Ban Day" apprenticeship programs.

Carry Forward Party History Spirit, Pass On Red Culture

In recent years, KIWL has built the Party History School and pioneered the cultural strategy of "Study Party History, Build a Century-Old KIWL," using red culture as the core of corporate culture. Party history education has been expanded to all employees, including new hire training with assessment, laying a solid ideological foundation for the long-term cultural strategy.
newsShow279_body:
Study Party History Well and Walk KIWL's New Era Long March

Amid a company-wide surge in in-depth Party history learning and education, KIWL Group Party Branch Secretary and Chairman Jiang Wei recently delivered a lecture at KIWL's Party History School for all Party members and activists, drawing strength from a century of Party history to walk KIWL's new era long march.

Secretary Jiang Wei spoke on the theme "Study Party History Well and Walk KIWL's Century-Long Journey," explaining the spiritual essence of a century of Party history from two perspectives: the birth and development of the CPC, and how to study Party history and build KIWL's next hundred years. He called on all members to study Party history, remember their mission, and follow the Party steadfastly. He emphasized building Party branches in private enterprises and guiding their development with Xi Jinping Thought on Socialism with Chinese Characteristics for a New Era, continuously drawing spiritual strength from Party history to support KIWL's high-quality development.

This Party lecture is a key part of KIWL's cultural program of "Study Party History, Build a Century-Old KIWL." Over more than three years, KIWL built its Party History School, which opened to the public in July last year with 1,200 square meters of exhibition space covering a century of Party history, a red book room, KIWL Party building, corporate culture, animated Party history education, and a secretary dialogue room. The school has welcomed more than 2,000 visitors.

The company regularly trains Party members, activists, middle managers, IE engineers, and KIWL master craftsmen. KIWL has also innovatively integrated Party history spirit and corporate culture into new employee onboarding, enriching red cultural education and putting the "Study Party History, Build a Century-Old KIWL" program into practice to provide strong spiritual momentum for sustainable development.
